title: Procedures for Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Procedures for Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres in Canada
The Procedures for Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres in Canada manual is targeted to heath care providers in Canada who wish to have their health care sites designated as Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres and to those who already work at designated sites.
Please refer to the manual for detailed information on the requirements to apply for and maintain designation as a Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre.
- Example of a completed International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis with unique Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre stamp (NEW version)
Example of a completed International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis with unique Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre stamp (NEW version)

- Recommendations for Completing the International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis (ICVP) for Poliovirus Vaccination
